label: Haywood Regular
description: Seven in. You're becoming a local.

label: True Local
description: You walked all of Haywood Road. This is yours.

label: Haywood Devotee
description: You found the hidden ones too. Not everyone does.
note: Unlocked by collecting all bonus stamps — OWL, Flora/Forage, Firestorm, Mocha Box

label: Hygge Five
description: The five warmest rooms on Haywood Road. You found all of them.
note: Unlocked by stamping all five hygge:true shops — Rowan, Bad Manners, Odd's, OWL, Forage at Flora
